---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Çankaya University, Turkey, 2019 - 2025 January.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  ASELSAN, Intern, 2023

2.  United Parcel Service Inc. (UPS), Intern, 2024

# Projects

## Graduation Projects

1. "Kargo Taşıma Operasyonlarında Bant Hattı Dengeleme ve Çapraz Sevkiyatta Kargo Boşaltma Çizgeleme Optimizasyonu", UPS Türkiye A.Ş., 2023-2024

# Competencies

Minitab, ERP, VBA, C#, R, Quarto, Git

# Hobbies

Archery, Volleyball, Cycling
